selection_reason: CARD-84 survived the compute-matched DNB-84 comparison but failed the stricter sham-control separation against RAND-84, so iteration 3 must pivot from a positive controller story to a skeptical audited-control story.

candidates.title: When Training-Free DLM Revision Gains Fail Under Audited Controls
candidates.summary: 把本轮论文对象锁定为 skeptical audit：说明一个看似可写成正向故事的 revision gain，经过 matched compute、sham control、per-sample audit 与 runtime repair 后，并不能被诚实地写成稳健的正向 controller claim。
post_pilot_readout: CARD-84 vs DNB-84 on GSM8K: net repaired = +7
CARD-84 vs RAND-84 on GSM8K: net repaired = +1
MBPP did not separate CARD-84 from RAND-84
artifact closure succeeded and now supports a clean skeptical read
candidates.claim_ceiling: 协议、边界与 falsification 论文；不写正向 controller 胜利
candidates.next_use: 作为 idea_debate、planning 与 writing 的唯一主线

candidates.title: Sham-Controlled Auditable Gain for Training-Free DLM Revision
candidates.summary: 这条线在 pilot 之前是合理前锋，但在更严格负对照下没有站稳，因此不能再作为 iteration 3 的 mainline。
candidates.rejection_reason: Failed the stricter sham-control gate because CARD-84 only beat RAND-84 by +1 net repaired sample on GSM8K.
candidates.claim_ceiling: 最多保留为 discussion 中的未完成正向可能性，不能作为主文主张

candidates.title: Trajectory-Aware Mechanism Add-On for Reasoning vs Code
candidates.summary: trajectory 指标本来只该做配件；既然 core lane 已 pivot，这条线本轮明确跳过而不是悬而未决。
candidates.rejection_reason: Negative pivot fired first, so trajectory analysis cannot rescue the main claim and is explicitly non-essential for iteration 3.
candidates.claim_ceiling: 未来若重启正向 controller lane，可作为补充解释
